title: DreamcraftRPG
description:
A persistent RPG sandbox server where players shape the world.

Form factions. Forge alliances. Fight for what you build.
body:
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
What is DreamCraft
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

A challenging persistent RPG sandbox.  This pack is intended and required to play on the Dreamcraft multiplayer server. https://modrinth.com/modpack/dream-craft  This world is shaped by the players who live in it. Every decision leaves a mark.

PvP is always on. Every player starts with personal claimable land. Form factions, forge alliances, break them when it suits you.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
What you'll do
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Explore and find your home. Dreamcraft's world is dense with dungeons, bosses and structures with loot that respawns every 18 hours per player, so there's always a reason to go back out.

Become a legend. Build your own playstyle through combat, spellcasting, affixes, relics, artifacts, and gem socketing. What you become is entirely up to you.

Teaming up isn't just for fun, it's for survival. Factions live and die by their power which can be lost when members die in PvP or won during faction vs faction sieges. Engineer your own defenses and tools with Create and Tetra. 

Dreamcraft features MineColonies where your faction grows living towns with NPC workers and run the in-game economy. Form trade hubs, and fortified cities for your faction. 

Dreamcraft has its own twelve-month in-game calendar. Each month, 
the balance of magical schools shifts. One rises while another weakens. Fire dominates in Emberrise, while Frostveil's 
icy grasp firmly holds Dreamcraft. Plan ahead or get caught unprepared.

The server is watched by AURA who schedules events, issues warnings, and bends the world based on what players do.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
Server address
